# GitHub Copilot Instructions

## Project summary
- This repository is a small Electron app (`taconyancat.js`) for macOS Touch Bar animation and audio playback.
- Keep changes minimal and focused on the requested issue.

## Code style
- Follow the existing JavaScript style in `taconyancat.js` (CommonJS, simple function-based structure).
- Avoid introducing new dependencies unless they are required.

## Validation
- There is currently no test or lint script in `package.json`.
- When code changes are made, validate by running available npm scripts relevant to the changed area.

## Scope guidance
- Do not modify media assets unless explicitly requested.
- Prefer documentation and targeted code updates over broad refactors.
